title: Comic Corpus script record
description: Normalized analysis of a TEXT comic script (the user's own story scripts) as corpus feedstock — the B1 path. Sibling of beats.schema.json (which analyzes rendered comics from page images). A script supports only the two TEXT-assessable rubric axes (growth density, story structure); the two VISUAL axes (camera dynamism, expression intensity) are deferred to storyboard/render and listed under deferred_axes. Reuses analysis-rubric.md vocabulary so scripts and comics pool into one corpus.

path.description: Local path to the raw script (gitignored) — provenance only.

transformation.description: The growth spine the script sets up.

flavor.description: potion | curse | latent-power | tech | rivalry-driven | training | ambient-field | ...

arc.description: one-line beat string: trigger -> escalation -> peak -> aftermath

narrative_arc.description: one-line arc, same convention as beats.json narrative_arc

est_growth_scene_ratio.description: Share of scenes that are active-growth — the script-level proxy for the growth-page ratio (corpus F1: transformation >= 0.60, climax >= 0.70, action >= 0.30).

assessable_scores.description: Only the rubric axes a TEXT script can be honestly scored on.

deferred_axes.description: Visual axes not assessable from script text; assess at storyboard/render.

strengths.description: What's strong — elements to STEAL into production (concrete).
